scripts.menu: echo '📋 Showing Commands Menu...' && call Scripts\menu.bat
scripts.certs:create:admin: echo 'Run this in an Administrator terminal!' && node Scripts/generate-certs.js --elevated
scripts.dev: echo '🚀 Starting local development environment...' && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
scripts.dev:detached: echo '🚀 Starting local development environment in detached mode...' && node scripts/run-detached.js
scripts.dev:stop: echo '🛑 Stopping local dev server development...' && node scripts/stop-server.js
scripts.dev:load-data: echo '📊 Loading local dev data...' && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development python manage.py load_test_data
scripts.dev:tunnel: echo '🚀 Starting dev tunnel...' && python tunnel.py
scripts.dev:cypress-open: echo '🔍 Opening Cypress in interactive mode...' && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development CYPRESS=true npx cypress open
scripts.dev:cypress-headed: echo '🚀 Running Cypress tests (headed)...' && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development CYPRESS=true npx cypress run --headed --browser chrome
scripts.dev:cypress-headless: echo '⚡ Running Cypress tests (headless)...' && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development CYPRESS=true npx cypress run --headless --browser chrome
scripts.dev:cypress-presentation: echo '⚡ Running Cypress tests for presentation (headed)...' && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development CYPRESS=true npx cypress run --headed --browser chrome --config video=true && npm run post-process-videos
scripts.dev:select-presentation: echo '🎬 Select a Cypress test from the list and run it for presentation (headed)...' && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development CYPRESS=true node scripts/create-presentation.js
scripts.dev:post-process-videos: echo '⚡ Running Post-Process Videos...' && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development CYPRESS=true node scripts/post-process-videos.js
scripts.dev:cypress-presentation-spec: echo '⚡ Running Cypress tests for presentation spec (headed)...' && dotenv -e .env.dev -- cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development CYPRESS=true npx cypress run --headed --browser chrome --config video=true --spec && npm run post-process-videos
scripts.docker:dev-start: echo '🚀 Ensuring certificates exist and starting dev environment...' && npm run certs:create && npm run docker:dev-detached
scripts.docker:dev-reset-and-start: echo '🔄 Resetting dev environment and starting fresh...' && npm run docker:rebuild-dev && npm run certs:create && npm run docker:dev-detached && node scripts/wait-for-ready.js && npm run docker:reset-db-migrate
scripts.docker:dev-migrate: echo '🔧 Running database migrations in dev container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev exec -T web-dev python manage.py migrate
scripts.docker:reset-db-migrate: echo '🔄 Resetting database with migrations...' && node scripts/reset-db-docker.js --migrate
scripts.docker:reset-db-full: echo '🔄 Full database reset with test data...' && node scripts/reset-db-docker.js --migrate --load-test-data
scripts.docker:dev: echo '🚀 Starting development environment...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev up
scripts.docker:dev-detached: echo '🚀 Starting development environment (detached)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev up -d
scripts.docker:dev-stop: echo '🛑 Stopping development services...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev down
scripts.docker:dev-logs: echo '📋 Showing development logs...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev logs -f
scripts.docker:dev-restart: echo '🔄 Restarting web-dev container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev restart web-dev
scripts.docker:dev-recreate: echo '🔄 Force recreating dev containers...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev up -d --force-recreate
scripts.docker:test: echo '🧪 Starting test environment...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test up
scripts.docker:test-detached: echo '🧪 Starting test environment (detached)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test up -d
scripts.docker:test-stop: echo '🛑 Stopping test services...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test down
scripts.docker:test-logs: echo '📋 Showing test logs...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test logs -f
scripts.docker:test-setup: echo '🔧 Setting up test data...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test run --rm test-setup
scripts.docker:cypress-start: echo '🚀 Starting Cypress container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test up -d cypress
scripts.docker:cypress-open: echo '🔍 Opening Cypress in existing container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test exec cypress open
scripts.docker:cypress-run: echo '⚡ Running Cypress tests in existing container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test exec cypress run
scripts.docker:cypress-stop: echo '🛑 Stopping Cypress container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test stop cypress
scripts.docker:cypress-run-headed: echo '🚀 Running Cypress tests (headed) in new container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test run --rm cypress cypress run --headed
scripts.docker:cypress-run-headless: echo '⚡ Running Cypress tests (headless) in new container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test run --rm cypress cypress run --headless $@
scripts.docker:cypress-run-connectivity: echo '⚡ Running connectivity tests (headless) in new container...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test run --rm cypress cypress run --headless --spec 'cypress/e2e/connectivity.cy.js'
scripts.docker:select-presentation: echo '🎬 Select a Cypress test from the list and run it for presentation (headed) in Docker...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation run --rm presentation node scripts/create-presentation-docker.js
scripts.docker:post-process-videos: echo '⚡ Running Post-Process Videos in Docker...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation run --rm presentation node scripts/post-process-videos-docker.js
scripts.docker:cypress-presentation-spec: echo '🚀 Running Docker Cypress tests for presentation spec...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test exec cypress run --headed --browser chrome --config video=true --spec && npm run docker:post-process-videos
scripts.docker:tunnel-build: echo '🐳 Building tunnel service...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel --progress=plain build tunnel
scripts.docker:tunnel-build-nocache: echo '🐳 Building tunnel service (no cache)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel --progress=plain build tunnel --no-cache
scripts.docker:tunnel: echo '🚀 Starting docker tunnel...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel up tunnel
scripts.docker:tunnel-detached: echo '🚀 Starting docker tunnel (detached)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel up -d tunnel
scripts.docker:tunnel-stop: echo '🛑 Stopping docker tunnel...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel stop tunnel
scripts.docker:tunnel-logs: echo '📋 Showing tunnel logs...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel logs -f tunnel
scripts.docker:build: echo '🐳 Building all service images...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev --profile test --profile tunnel --profile presentation --progress=plain build
scripts.docker:build-nocache: echo '🐳 Building all service images (no cache)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev --profile test --profile tunnel --profile presentation --progress=plain build --no-cache
scripts.docker:build-dev: echo '🐳 Building dev service images...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev --progress=plain build
scripts.docker:build-dev-nocache: echo '🐳 Building dev service images (no cache)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev --progress=plain build --no-cache
scripts.docker:build-cypress: echo '🐳 Building Cypress service image...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test --progress=plain build cypress
scripts.docker:build-cypress-nocache: echo '🐳 Building Cypress service image (no cache)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test --progress=plain build cypress --no-cache
scripts.docker:build-presentation: echo '🐳 Building presentation service images...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation --progress=plain build
scripts.docker:build-presentation-nocache: echo '🐳 Building presentation service images (no cache)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation --progress=plain build --no-cache
scripts.docker:rebuild: echo '🐳 Completely rebuilding all services...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel down -v --rmi all && npm run docker:build
scripts.docker:rebuild-dev: echo '🐳 Rebuilding dev services...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev build
scripts.docker:rebuild-test: echo '🐳 Rebuilding test services...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test build
scripts.docker:rebuild-presentation: echo '🐳 Rebuilding presentation services...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation build
scripts.docker:logs: echo '📋 Showing service logs...' && docker-compose logs -f
scripts.docker:shell: echo '🖥️  Opening shell in service container...' && docker-compose --profile dev exec
scripts.docker:down-volumes: echo '🗑️  Stopping all services and removing volumes...' && docker-compose down -v
scripts.docker:prune: echo '🧹 Cleaning up unused Docker resources...' && docker system prune -f
scripts.docker:reset: echo '🔄 Resetting environment...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation down -v --rmi all && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel down -v --rmi all && docker system prune -f
scripts.docker:reset-keep-images: echo '🔄 Resetting environment (keeping base images)...' && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile dev down -v && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile test down -v && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile presentation down -v && docker-compose --env-file .env.docker --profile tunnel down -v && docker system prune -f --filter 'until=24h'
scripts.status: echo '📊 Showing service status...' && docker-compose ps
scripts.shell: echo '🖥️  Opening shell in service container...' && docker-compose --profile dev exec
scripts.pfs: echo 'Prints Project Folder Structure..' && node scripts/pfs.js
scripts.psql: echo 'Running PSQL..' && docker exec -it db psql -U dbuser -d badminton_court
scripts.docker:backup-images: echo '📦 Backing up all available Docker images into a single archive (all-images.tar)...' && node scripts/backupImages.js
scripts.docker:restore-images: echo '📦 Restoring all Docker images from a single archive (all-images.tar)...' && node scripts/restoreImages.js
scripts.docker:backup-individual: echo '➕ Adding one or more images to the all-images.tar archive (e.g.: npm run docker:backup-individual -- web-dev)...' && node scripts/backupIndividual.js
scripts.docker:restore-image: echo '📦 Restoring a specific Docker image from the all-images.tar archive (e.g.: npm run docker:restore-image -- web-dev)...' && node scripts/restoreImage.js
scripts.docker:list-backups: echo '📋 Listing available backup files in the ./backups directory...' && node scripts/listBackups.js
scripts.docker:list-backup-contents: echo '📋 Listing the raw contents of the all-images.tar archive...' && node scripts/listBackupContents.js
scripts.docker:list-backup-image-names: echo '🏷️ Showing a human-readable list of images in the all-images.tar archive...' && node scripts/listBackupImageNames.js
scripts.docker:save-to-hub: echo '💾 Saving running containers to Docker Hub...' && node scripts/saveToDockerHub.js
scripts.docker:desktop-reset: echo '🔄 COMPLETE Docker reset (fixes content store corruption)...' && node scripts/docker-desktop-reset.js
scripts.docker:desktop-reset-and-rebuild: echo '🔄 COMPLETE Docker reset and rebuild everything...' && node scripts/docker-desktop-reset-and-rebuild.js
